hero.title: Pioneer Technology
hero.subtitle: Apatek Vietnam provides leading digital transformation solutions, information security, and enterprise optimization for businesses across Vietnam and the world.

about.title: About Us
about.body1: Apatek Vietnam Joint Stock Company is a pioneer in the technology sector, specializing in digital transformation solutions, information security, and enterprise operation optimization. With a team of experienced experts and a modern technology platform, we are committed to delivering innovative solutions that help businesses improve performance and create sustainable competitive advantages.
about.body2: Apatek is proud to be a technology partner of major corporations such as Viettel, Samsung, Habeco, Ministry of Finance, General Department of Taxation... We not only provide solutions but also accompany customers on their digital transformation journey.
about.director_quote: Shaping the future of maritime. We develop advanced technology solutions to enhance situational awareness, optimize operations, and support decision-making — contributing to a safer, smarter, and more sustainable maritime environment.

history.title: Company History
history.description: By combining modern technology and deep understanding of market needs, we not only provide solutions but also accompany customers in the digital transformation process.
history.2019_body: Established with a vision to develop advanced technology solutions helping businesses optimize operations and information security. Signed cooperation with major technology partners: Acumatica, Fortinet, Cisco, Microsoft.
history.2020_body: Expanded into Distribution Channel Management (DMS), developed software for FMCG enterprises. Successfully implemented technology projects for the Ministry of Finance, General Department of Taxation, Viettel, and FMCG companies like Habeco.
history.2024_body: Established a representative office in Ho Chi Minh City, expanding market share in enterprise management software and information security. Signed cooperation with JRC for VTS solutions for seaports.
history.2025_body: Deployed AI and Big Data solutions in enterprise management and operations, enhancing technology consulting and implementation capabilities. Rolled out VTS solutions for major Maritime Port Authorities.

vision.title: Vision & Mission
vision.vision_body: Build a safer, smarter, and more sustainable maritime future through innovation and advanced technology.
vision.mission_body: Deliver innovative solutions that help the maritime industry operate more safely, intelligently, and efficiently.
vision.value1_body: Always applying the most advanced technology available.
vision.value2_body: Every solution revolves around the actual needs of the business.
vision.value3_body: Committed to fast deployment and cost optimization.
vision.value4_body: International-standard services, ensuring security and stability.

products.title: Products & Services
products.description: We provide comprehensive technology solutions tailored for modern enterprises.
products.p1_body: Distribution Channel Management (DMS) solution — Applied for the FMCG industry, helping optimize the supply chain.
products.p2_body: Dredging operations monitoring solution using AIS technology - Tracks dredging vessels, dredging equipment and maritime channel maintenance. Provides real-time data to optimize management and ensure maritime safety.
products.p3_body: Security, information safety, and system integration solutions for enterprises. Video conferencing & security surveillance systems.
products.p4_body: Vessel Traffic Service (VTS) monitoring and coordination solution — Applied for Vietnam Maritime Administration and local Port Authorities.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Apatek's team is always an important resource contributing to the company's sustainable development. We are experienced technology experts, always striving to create a dynamic and creative working environment.

partners.title: Partners
partners.description: Apatek has established close relationships with major technology hardware manufacturers, software companies, and official distributors in Vietnam.

clients.title: Featured Clients
clients.description: We are proud to partner with leading organizations across government, technology, finance, manufacturing, and services. Each client is a success story reflecting long-term trust and cooperation.

news.title: Latest News
news.description: Stay updated with Apatek's latest projects, partnerships, and technology milestones across Vietnam.

vts-port-authorities-2025.title: Apatek Deploys VTS Solutions to Vietnam Port Authorities
vts-port-authorities-2025.excerpt: Apatek completes rollout of JRC-powered VTS platform for regional port authorities, delivering 24/7 situational awareness and traffic control.
vts-port-authorities-2025.body1: Apatek Vietnam has successfully deployed its Vessel Traffic Service (VTS) solution to multiple port authorities across Vietnam, marking a major milestone in the company's maritime technology portfolio.
vts-port-authorities-2025.body2: Built on JRC technology and integrated with radar, AIS, CCTV, and environmental sensors, the platform gives VTS operators a unified real-time picture of vessel movements, enabling faster decision-making and safer waterways.
vts-port-authorities-2025.body3: The deployment reinforces Apatek's position as a trusted technology partner for mission-critical maritime operations, with full IALA compliance and resilient architecture designed for continuous operations.

digital-transformation-tax.title: Apatek Supports Digital Transformation for Tax Administration
digital-transformation-tax.excerpt: Apatek partners with government agencies to modernize tax administration systems, improving efficiency and data security at national scale.
digital-transformation-tax.body1: Apatek Vietnam continues to expand its footprint in the public sector with digital transformation projects for tax administration, helping agencies streamline operations and improve service delivery.
digital-transformation-tax.body2: The solutions integrate secure data management, workflow automation, and analytics dashboards tailored to the requirements of large government organizations.
digital-transformation-tax.body3: With proven experience serving the General Department of Taxation and Ministry of Finance, Apatek brings enterprise-grade reliability to national-scale digital infrastructure.

ai-big-data-enterprise.title: Apatek Launches AI & Big Data Solutions for Enterprises
ai-big-data-enterprise.excerpt: New AI and Big Data capabilities help enterprises unlock insights from operational data and accelerate intelligent decision-making.
ai-big-data-enterprise.body1: Apatek has introduced a new suite of AI and Big Data solutions designed to help enterprises transform raw operational data into actionable business intelligence.
ai-big-data-enterprise.body2: From predictive analytics to automated reporting, the platform supports FMCG, manufacturing, and maritime clients in optimizing supply chains and improving operational visibility.
ai-big-data-enterprise.body3: This launch reflects Apatek's 2025 strategy to combine domain expertise with modern data platforms, enabling clients to move faster in an increasingly data-driven economy.

careers.title: Careers
careers.description: Build the future of maritime and enterprise technology with a team that values innovation, quality, and customer impact.
careers.openings_desc: Explore roles across engineering, maritime solutions, and business development. We welcome talented professionals who share our passion for technology.
careers.benefit1_body: Work on mission-critical systems for government agencies, port authorities, and leading enterprises.
careers.benefit2_body: Learn from experienced engineers and consultants across maritime, security, and enterprise software.
careers.benefit3_body: Continuous training, certifications, and exposure to international technology partners.
careers.benefit4_body: A collaborative environment that rewards initiative, quality, and customer-centric thinking.

software-engineer.title: Software Engineer
software-engineer.summary: Design and develop enterprise applications, APIs, and integration solutions for government and commercial clients.
software-engineer.req1: 3+ years experience with Java, .NET, or Node.js
software-engineer.req2: Experience with databases, REST APIs, and system integration
software-engineer.req3: Strong problem-solving skills and team collaboration

vts-engineer.title: VTS Solutions Engineer
vts-engineer.summary: Implement and support Vessel Traffic Service systems for port authorities using JRC maritime technology.
vts-engineer.req1: Background in maritime systems, radar/AIS, or SCADA
vts-engineer.req2: Willingness to travel to port sites across Vietnam
vts-engineer.req3: Technical documentation and client-facing communication skills

business-development.title: Business Development Executive
business-development.summary: Identify and develop new business opportunities in enterprise software and maritime technology markets.
business-development.req1: 2+ years in B2B sales or business development
business-development.req2: Understanding of IT services or maritime industry preferred
business-development.req3: Fluent Vietnamese; English communication is a plus

vts.title: Vessel Traffic Service
vts.subtitle: Real-time vessel tracking and traffic management for Vietnam's busiest ports — powered by JRC technology, delivered by Apatek.
vts.overview_title: Built for the most demanding ports
vts.overview_body: Vessel traffic management leaves no room for guesswork. You need real-time awareness of every vessel, every movement, and every potential risk. Apatek's VTS solution — powered by JRC — gives port authorities the operational clarity to keep waterways safe, operators confident, and compliant with IALA standards.
vts.tech_subtitle: All data streams fused into one unified operational picture
vts.tech_radar_desc: Long-range vessel detection under all weather conditions
vts.tech_ais_desc: Real-time Automatic Identification System vessel data
vts.tech_vhf_desc: Integrated voice communication with vessel crews
vts.tech_env_desc: Wind, tide, and weather monitoring sensors
vts.cap1_body: Radar + AIS + CCTV fused into a single real-time display. No blind spots. No delays.
vts.cap2_body: Custom speed, zone, and course-deviation alarms trigger instantly. Configurable per waterway.
vts.cap3_body: Auto-generate SOLAS, IMO FAL, and port-state control reports with one-click export.
vts.cap4_body: AI-based trajectory forecasting helps operators detect risk long before it becomes critical.
vts.cap5_body: Built-in redundancy and failover so VTSOs can focus entirely on the job.
vts.cap6_body: Fully compliant with international VTS standards. Certified for operational deployment.
vts.clients_body: Apatek's VTS solution has been adopted by the Vietnam Maritime Administration and key regional port authorities, delivering around-the-clock situational awareness and traffic control.
vts.cta_title: Ready to upgrade your port's traffic management?
vts.cta_body: Talk to our VTS specialists to get a tailored demo for your waterway.
vts.form_message: Tell us about your current setup

references.title: References
references.hero_label: Rely on what our customers say
references.description: Trusted by ports and maritime authorities worldwide.
references.cta_body: Port authorities and businesses have successfully deployed Apatek solutions and shared their real-world results.

solutions.title: Solutions
solutions.description: Specialized technology solutions that help maritime and enterprise operations run safer, smarter, and more efficiently.

vts.title: Vessel Traffic Services (VTS)
vts.subtitle: An IALA-compliant vessel traffic management platform — deployed for Vietnamese port authorities and maritime agencies
vts.intro1: Vessel traffic management leaves no room for guesswork. Whether it's a port authority managing a busy harbour or a maritime agency overseeing coastal waterways, every organisation needs real-time awareness of every vessel, every movement, and every potential risk.
vts.intro2: Apatek's VTS solution is built on advanced maritime technology, fully IALA-compliant — delivering the operational clarity needed to keep waterways safe, operators confident, and systems continuously aligned with regulatory requirements.
vts.intro3: Apatek delivers VTS across two distinct deployment paths, each tailored to the specific operational needs of its users.
vts.ports_intro: Port authorities need to accurately track every vessel entering and leaving the port — from large cargo ships to high-speed ferries — while ensuring compliance with maritime safety regulations in a high-density environment. Apatek's VTS for Ports fuses radar, AIS, and CCTV into a single operational picture, enabling efficient vessel coordination and minimising collision risk.
vts.ports_feature1_body: Monitor every vessel in your port with live AIS and radar data fused into a single, unified display. No blind spots, no lag.
vts.ports_feature2_body: Data is organised and ready for export, so you can generate the reports you need to steer decisions and track maritime operations efficiently.
vts.ports_feature3_body: Set custom boundaries and thresholds — speed violations, course deviations, and zone breaches trigger instant operator alerts.
vts.ports_feature4_body: Generate SOLAS, IMO FAL, and port state control reports automatically, with one-click export for audits and inspections.
vts.maritime_title: Coastal and inland waterway traffic management
vts.maritime_intro: Maritime authorities managing broad coastal zones need situational awareness in depth — not just position tracking, but the ability to anticipate traffic developments and support timely decisions. Apatek's VTS for Maritime Authorities provides comprehensive analysis capabilities, automated traffic sequencing, and compliance tools aligned with international maritime standards.
vts.maritime_feature1_body: Maintain full situational awareness of all vessel movements within your VTS area, with AIS, radar, and sensor data integrated into a single operational view.
vts.maritime_feature2_body: Enhance navigational safety and efficiency through automated traffic sequencing, factoring in vessel priority, environmental conditions, and traffic density.
vts.maritime_feature3_body: Configure dynamic safety zones and operational thresholds. Instantly detect and respond to speed violations, course deviations, and unauthorized zone incursions.
vts.maritime_feature4_body: Automatically generate reports aligned with international maritime regulations, supporting compliance, audits, and incident investigations to IMO and IALA standards.
vts.benefit1_body: High-grade vessel tracking and alerting for all vessel types — from small craft to large ships and high-speed ferries — operating reliably under all conditions.
vts.benefit2_body: An exact fit for any port or waterway today, with the architecture to grow as your operational needs evolve.
vts.benefit3_body: Security specialists involved at every step of development and deployment, ensuring the system meets the highest maritime security standards.
vts.benefit4_body: Developed together with VTSOs to deliver an intuitive interface that gets operators up and running fast and working effectively from day one.
vts.closing_title: Superior situational awareness for safer waterways
vts.closing_body: When every vessel movement, every maritime event, and every compliance requirement is managed on one unified platform, port authorities and maritime agencies gain the ability to operate on real data rather than fragmented information. This strengthens maritime safety, improves operational efficiency, and supports timely, accurate decision-making.

ais-dredging.title: AIS Dredging Monitoring Solution
ais-dredging.subtitle: A dredging operations monitoring platform that enhances situational awareness and supports accurate decision-making
ais-dredging.intro1: Dredging operations require transparency, continuous control, and independent verification. When construction volumes are large, multiple vessels are involved, and monitoring areas are widespread, traditional tracking methods often fail to meet modern management requirements.
ais-dredging.intro2: The AIS Dredging Monitoring System is designed to provide comprehensive situational awareness of dredgers, transport barges, and support vessels. By integrating real-time AIS data, digital maps, and specialized monitoring zones, the system helps authorities accurately track all activities within project areas, detect anomalies early, and support fast, accurate decisions.
ais-dredging.intro3: Built as an open platform, the solution scales flexibly with project size, management requirements, and evolving industry regulations — delivering a centralized, transparent, and efficient monitoring environment that strengthens management capacity, reduces risk, and ensures compliance throughout dredging operations.
ais-dredging.section1: The solution provides real-time monitoring of all dredging activities, turning voyage data into actionable management intelligence. Smart alerts and an intuitive interface help operators quickly detect abnormal events, assess impact, and take necessary action.
ais-dredging.section2: With a user-centric approach, the system shortens onboarding time, improves operational efficiency, and maintains high control over all field construction activities.
ais-dredging.feature1_body: Continuously track position, heading, speed, and operational status of dredgers and related vessels on a unified interface.
ais-dredging.feature2_body: Configure geofences to monitor permitted work areas, disposal zones, and restricted areas. The system automatically detects out-of-bounds activity.
ais-dredging.feature3_body: Track the full cycle from dredging areas to disposal or stockpile sites, supporting volume assessment and extraction efficiency.
ais-dredging.feature4_body: Automatically detect abnormal stops, inappropriate route changes, off-hours activity, or entry into restricted zones.
ais-dredging.feature5_body: Store complete voyage, event, and vessel activity data for inspection, acceptance, and construction volume reconciliation.
ais-dredging.benefit1_body: Continuous, accurate monitoring based on real-time AIS data, reducing reliance on manual reports and increasing project transparency.
ais-dredging.benefit2_body: Easily expand monitoring scope, add project areas, vessels, or new data sources as management needs evolve.
ais-dredging.benefit3_body: Centrally managed data with role-based access and security suitable for government agencies, investors, and supervision consultants.
ais-dredging.benefit4_body: An intuitive interface focused on field monitoring workflows, enabling users to quickly adopt and operate the system effectively.

testimonials.quote: Apatek demonstrated outstanding capability in integrating maritime monitoring systems on a unified platform, improving management efficiency and data utilization for operations.
We highly value Apatek's professionalism throughout project implementation — from survey and design to operation and post-handover technical support.
The solution deployed by Apatek meets operational requirements well, ensuring stability, reliability, and effectiveness in maritime monitoring.
Apatek proved its ability to integrate and deploy complex maritime technology systems, contributing to stronger monitoring and waterway traffic management in the region.
The Apatek team is proactive, responsible, and supportive throughout system operation, ensuring continuous and effective performance.
Apatek meets technical requirements for large-scale systems while demonstrating structured, professional project deployment and management.

testimonials.client: Ho Chi Minh City Port Authority
testimonials.quote: With solid experience and expertise, Apatek successfully deployed maritime monitoring solutions that deliver practical results for management and operations.

ais-dredging.closing_title: One unified data source for all stakeholders
ais-dredging.closing_body: A centralized, trusted data source enables authorities, investors, and contractors to work from the same operational picture. All information is updated in real time, improving coordination, transparency, and data-driven decision-making.

dms.title: Distribution Management System (DMS)
dms.subtitle: A comprehensive distribution channel management platform for modern enterprises
dms.intro1: In an increasingly competitive market, businesses need tight control over distribution from manufacturers to distributors, agents, retail outlets, and end consumers. However, fragmented data, poor connectivity, and slow updates often lead to inventory loss of control, opaque sales figures, and difficulty evaluating market performance.
dms.intro2: Distribution Management System (DMS) digitizes the entire sales and distribution process, helping enterprises build a unified, transparent, and efficient operating ecosystem. The system provides real-time business monitoring, connecting manufacturers, distributors, sales teams, and retail points on one centralized data platform.
dms.intro3: Through process automation, data standardization, and intelligent analytics tools, DMS helps enterprises strengthen governance, optimize operational performance, and drive sustainable growth across the entire distribution network.
dms.tagline1: Built to manage complex distribution networks.
dms.section1: DMS transforms traditional management into real-time, data-driven operations. Everything from ordering, inventory management, market monitoring, sales force management to promotion execution is digitized and connected on one unified platform.
dms.section2: As a result, enterprises can quickly grasp business conditions, optimize resources, and make more accurate decisions at every management level.
dms.feature1_body: Centrally manage distributors, agents, stores, and outlets nationwide. Track performance, sales, and market coverage for each unit in the network.
dms.feature2_body: Digitize the full process from order creation, approval, delivery, reconciliation to transaction completion. Reduce manual errors and shorten order processing time.
dms.feature3_body: Track inventory at factories, central warehouses, distributors, and outlets. Support demand forecasting and optimize goods flow to reduce holding costs and stockouts.
dms.feature4_body: Support sales teams with route planning, visit scheduling, order capture, display checks, and market data updates on mobile devices.
dms.feature5_body: Configure, deploy, and monitor promotions, pricing policies, discounts, and trade support programs across the distribution system.
dms.feature6_body: Multi-dimensional reporting on sales, inventory, market coverage, sales performance, and distributor effectiveness to support fast, accurate leadership decisions.
dms.benefit1_body: Track sales and distribution in real time, strengthening management capacity and enabling rapid response to market changes.
dms.benefit2_body: Help sales teams work more effectively through process automation, less manual processing, and more customer-facing time.
dms.benefit3_body: Improve demand forecasting, optimize goods flow, and reduce operating costs across the distribution chain.
dms.benefit4_body: Build a centralized, consistent, and reliable data source for every management level, from field sales to executive leadership.
dms.benefit5_body: Increase market coverage, improve customer service quality, and enhance execution of sales strategies.
dms.benefit6_body: Easily integrate with ERP, CRM, BI, accounting, warehousing, and other enterprise systems to form a comprehensive digital management platform.

testimonials.author: Mr. Pham Kinh Kha — Chairman of Menvodka
testimonials.quote: Apatek digs deep to understand the problems and challenges of our business, then develops solutions to bring us to success. Thanks to Apatek's solutions, we have resolved increasingly complex issues to operate more effectively. Flexibility, creativity, and dedication are the hallmarks of the Apatek team.

testimonials.author: Mr. Nguyen Dang Toan — Director, Habeco Trading Co., Ltd.
testimonials.quote: Choosing Apatek as the operating partner to support the DMS, PG system was the right decision for Habeco. With a long-term partnership mindset, Apatek has helped Habeco improve operations, deploy scalable solutions, and effectively leverage the DMS, PG system.
Apatek is a trusted technology partner, always supporting us in optimizing operations and improving system utilization efficiency.
We highly appreciate Apatek's deployment capability, professionalism, and quick responsiveness.
The solution deployed by Apatek has contributed to improved distribution channel management and business operations.
Apatek proactively supports, continuously improves the system, and accompanies us throughout our development journey.

dms.closing_title: One data source for the entire distribution ecosystem
dms.closing_body: When all sales, distribution, and market activities are managed on one unified platform, enterprises gain the ability to operate on real data instead of fragmented reports — strengthening cross-department coordination, improving decision quality, and building a foundation for long-term growth.
dms.closing_extra: DMS is not only a distribution management solution but also a digital transformation platform that helps enterprises build a modern, transparent, and scalable sales network for the future.
